allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k!='candidates'}, indent=2\)\); c=d.get\('candidates',[{}]\)[0]; p=c.get\('content',{}\).get\('parts',[]\); print\('Parts count:', len\(p\)\); print\('Part types:', [list\(x.keys\(\)\) for x in p]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); const c=d.candidates?.[0]; const parts=c?.content?.parts||[]; console.log\('error?', d.error?.message\); console.log\('parts count:', parts.length\); parts.forEach\(\(p,i\)=>console.log\('part',i,'keys:', Object.keys\(p\)\)\);")

Bash(curl -s -X POST 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-2.5-flash-image:generateContent?key=AIzaSyDdaBylAfq9-UayH46OKEiu0sOkY7cxfAM' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"contents":[{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"Generate a simple room image with a sofa"}]}],"generationConfig":{"responseModalities":["TEXT","IMAGE"]}}' -o /tmp/gemini_test.json)
